data.content:
Here's what was wrong and what I fixed:

**5 bugs found across the two `Directory.Build.props` files:**

| # | File | Bug | Fix |
|---|------|-----|-----|
| 1 | `hard/src/` | `<Import>` placed AFTER property sets — parent's values overwrote child's `DefineConstants` append | Moved `<Import>` to **top** so parent evaluates first |
| 2 | `hard/src/` | `LangVersion` set unconditionally — projects couldn't inherit a different default | Added `Condition="'$(LangVersion)' == ''"` (same pattern as parent) |
| 3 | `hard/src/` | AOT condition `$(EnableAot) == true` unquoted — empty property causes parse errors on some MSBuild versions | Fixed to `'$(EnableAot)' == 'true'` |
| 4 | `hard/src/` | `<NoWarn>CS1591;IDE0005</NoWarn>` overwrites any parent suppressions | Changed to `$(NoWarn);CS1591;IDE0005` to preserve inherited values |
| 5 | `hard/src/` | `OutputPath` uses `\` separator (`artifacts\bin`) — literal backslash on Linux | Changed to `/` which works cross-platform |
| 6 | `hard/` (parent) | `<DefineConstants>REPO_BUILD</DefineConstants>` clobbers any previously-defined constants | Changed to `$(DefineConstants);REPO_BUILD` |

The root cause of most issues was **import order**: properties were set before the parent was imported, so the parent's unconditional `DefineConstants` wiped out the child's earlier append.
